allow: Bash(for pkg in extension-code-block extension-image extension-indent editor-toolbar editor-main)
Bash(for c in Button Spin IconFont InputNumber DropdownPanel Dropdown DropdownList Popover Tooltip Modal Message Switch FilePreview)
Bash(head -20 echo "" echo "=== editor-common still exports BubbleMenu + Upload ===" grep -E "BubbleMenu|Upload" packages/editor-common/dist/index.d.mts)

Bash(head -10 echo "" echo "=== editor-common 仍 re-export UI 组件 ===" grep -E "\(Modal|Dropdown|Button|Message|Spin|Switch|Tooltip|Popover|FilePreview|InputNumber|Iconfont\)" packages/editor-common/dist/index.d.mts)
Bash(bash -c "source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use v20.19.0 >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx playwright test test/perf-toolbar-active.spec.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | tail -40")
